name: Almost-a-Meal Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 large bell pepper, cut in strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine browned and drained beef, onion, and chopped tomatoes with liquid, Worcestershire sauce, and salt.
2. Spoon the mixture into a greased 3-quart casserole dish.
3. Layer potatoes, flour, corn, lima beans, and green peppers on top.
4. Cover and bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes. Sprinkle with cheese and continue baking, uncovered, for 30 minutes longer.
